title: Death Coord
description: A lightweight simple mod that tells you the coordinates of your last death
body:
[![Create a server with bisecthosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eaa856bc4009fc52d9b0664e283d3da7c9edf3a5_0.webp)](https://url-shortener.curseforge.com/8bEWR)


A simple lightweight client-side mod that prints out the coordinates of your last death in a chat message with the option of copying

![functionality of the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a17ac140f9b871d6189c39fdd7ffe4c641054d2.png)

This mod also adds 2 new commands

- /copydeathcoords (to copy your last death coordinates)
- /copycoords (to copy your coordinates)
